tweets.text:
This one wont be popular either. We wouldn’t have had so many concerns with these cities if we DIDNT SURRENDER  Minneapolis on bad advice… and tripled down on every city like Philly , Chicago & NYC. 
   Instead we let Bovino leave.. we are still letting the left dictate our policy.. we’re bombing countries.. didn’t stop Ukraine.. the deep state walks unimpeded and TONIGHT.. someone had the great idea to let President Trump do a MSM interview.  With the Deepstate Mockingbird enemy.
    The msm that nobody watches.. because he’s getting BOOMER FOX ADVICE… so what did they do on this interview??? THEY READ THE MANIFESTO FOR THE LEFTIST who almost killed an SS agent.. and wanted to target the President. .. and read out loud lies that “He wanted to kill you for r@ping children..” 
     And we had Obama defending the shooter and they READ THAT ON PURPOSE TO INSPIRE MORE LUIGISSSS just like Cole Allen.
      Whoever is giving him this advice 24 hours after an attempt on his life AGAIN.. needs to be fired because they are either MENTALLY RETARDED OR COMPLICIT  w/ the deep state with running out the clock.
           Or they could have listened to you last year when said it’s time to destroy these networks. This SPLC law center news sure did get pushed off the map huh? 
    Remember when Tucker said Americans crave a Bukele who sticks to their promises? It’s true.
